title: Kiss Me You Fucking Moron
original_title: Kyss meg for faen i helvete
overview: Some teenagers are ambitiously setting up a famous Jon Fosse-play. They hire a well known actor to be their mentor, unaware that he's going through a life crisis. Their new mentor chooses Vegard, promising footballer and local douchebag, to play the leading role.
